name: Alien first contact ["The daxy Imperium"]
description:
[Cw: Femdom,degregation, Xenophobia.]

Yap sesh.

Sooo another bot I guess. This is more a. Filler bot really since I'm still on my break. And this a prologue to the prologue :)

Anyhow yeah. This is the first meeting between humans and daxy. And of course humanity first contact with aliens.

And how did the find earth? Voyager 1 and the golden record and after deciphering the record thought "these human guys seem pretty cool. Let's assimilate them in to our empire!" Since their species was dying due to under population.
